title: FLOORINGTON Spray Mop for Floor Cleaning Wet & Dry Microfiber Mop with 550ML Refillable Bottle, 4 Washable Pads, 4 Microfibre Cloth and 1 Scraper Perfect for Home, Kitchen, Hardwood, Tile Floors PS08
features: MESS-FREE FLOOR CLEANING : Say goodbye to soaking your floors or hauling heavy buckets! FLOORINGTON Spray Mop is the ultimate solution for effortless cleaning. Equipped with a fine mist spray nozzle, it releases an even, wide mist with a simple press of the trigger, keeping the floor just slightly wet for easy and efficient cleaning. Its innovative flash spray nozzle ensures quick and effective mopping, making it the perfect choice for hassle-free floor care.
SPRAY MOP KIT : This Spray Mop comes with a 550ML refillable bottle, 4 washable pads, and 1 scraper.Enjoy a mess-free and efficient cleaning experience with this mop set.

DURABLE AND REUSABLE MICROFIBRE PADS : Our microfiber spray mop with washable pads is perfect for all hard surfaces, including hardwood, tile, and laminate. With strong absorption, it picks up dirt, dust, pet hair, and spills with ease. Ideal for homes, offices, and more, the 4 machine-washable pads offer convenience and long-lasting use.

360° SWIVEL FLOOR MOP : Spray Mop features a 360° swiveling mop head and an upgraded Velcro design for effortless cleaning. The flexible mop head easily adjusts to reach tight spaces, corners, and under bulky furniture like sofas and beds. With its slim microfiber pad, it effortlessly glides into nooks and crannies, ensuring every area is thoroughly cleaned. The Velcro design makes attaching mop pads simple, giving you a hassle-free cleaning experience for a spotless home.

EFFICIENT HARDWOOD FLOOR CLEANING : FLOORINGTON Hardwood Floor Mop features anti-leakage technology, preventing leaks during use. Its 550ML refillable bottle lets you choose your own cleaning solution for different needs. This mop covers large areas without frequent refills, offering flexibility. Avoid boiling water or strong acids to protect the bottle.

INCLUDES FREE 4 MICROFIBRE CLEANING CLOTH : Perfect for cleaning kitchen countertops, indoor and outdoor spaces, and keeping your car tidy. Great for travel and camping, offering a convenient solution with minimal effort.
description: Product Description REUSABLE AND WASHABLE MICROFIBER PADS SAVE MONEY AND ENVIRONMENT The reusable pads can be washed by hand or machine, saving money on disposables. Soft and absorbent microfiber pads are safe for all floors, including hardwood, laminate, tile, marble, and glass, ensuring excellent cleaning. MORE COMFORTABLE TO OPERATE An ergonomic handle fits the hand's natural grip, reducing strain and fatigue, making tools more comfortable 550ML LARGE CAPACITY WATER TANK With a 550ml water tank, you can add cleaning solutions as needed. The water bottles have a special no-leak buckle design, ensuring a hassle-free and efficient cleaning experience. PRACTICAL SCRAPER TOOL The handy scraper removes hair and dirt from the microfiber mop pads before washing and tackles stubborn floor spots. You could attach it to the mop pole for easy access and quick clean ups. 360° ROTATING MOP HEAD The mop head effortlessly reaches corners under furniture without moving them. No more bending over—let the spray mop with washable pads clean those hard-to-reach areas with ease. SUPER FINE NOZZLE Just pull the trigger, and the spray mop dispenses the perfect amount of solution. It sprays a fine mist for efficient, thorough cleaning, making your floors shine effortlessly.
